title: His Prayer To Ben Jonson
content:
When I a verse shall make,
Know I have pray'd thee,
For old religion's sake,
Saint Ben to aid me.

Make the way smooth for me,
When I, thy Herrick,
Honouring thee, on my knee
Offer my lyric.

Candles I'll give to thee,
And a new altar,
And thou, Saint Ben, shalt be
Writ in my psalter.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "His Prayer To Ben Jonson"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
